borderlesswindow.options.screen_mode.too: Choose between a normal window, borderless fullscreen, or Minecraft's regular exclusive fullscreen.
borderlesswindow.options.f11_mode.name: F11 Mode
borderlesswindow.options.f11_mode.toolti: What the F11 key does: toggle borderless fullscreen, toggle Minecraft's regular exclusive fullscreen, or cycle through all three screen modes.
borderlesswindow.options.fps_overlay_mod: Shows an FPS counter on screen. Simple displays only the current FPS; Extended shows a single line with the current FPS plus the Min (1% low), Avg and Max FPS over the last 15 seconds. The overlay hides itself while the F3 debug screen is open.
borderlesswindow.options.fps_overlay_pos: Corner of the screen where the FPS overlay is drawn.
borderlesswindow.config.title: Borderless Window Settings
